violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in prep table cooler and lower shelving part of prep table have accumulation of food debris and need detail cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Unlabeled chemical spray bottle on lower shelf at 3 compartment sink line.
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
